case_title: CACH LLC VS. MANUEL ANCHETA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANCHETA, MANUEL $6,042.46 PRINCIPAL, $950.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $122.84 INTEREST, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,400.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
